Notice Of Hearing On A Petition For Relief To Compel Kazan, Mcclain, Lyons, Greenwood & Harley, A Professional Law Corporation To Comply With Subpoena; Request For Judicial Notice; Declarations Of James F. Ruggeri
Off Calendar May-03-2013 Text Ruling

Notice Of Hearing On A Petition For Relief To Compel Kazan, Mcclain, Lyons, Greenwood & Harley, A Professional Law Corporation To Comply With Subpoena; Request For Judicial Notice; Declarations Of James F. Ruggeri
Off Calendar Apr-10-2013 Continued To May-15-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PETITIONERS HARTFORD ACCIDENT AND INDEMNITY COMPANY, FIRST STATE INSURANCE COMPANY AND NEW ENGLAND INSURANCE COMPANY'S Petition For Relief To Compel Kazan, Mcclain, Lyons, Greenwood & Harley, A Professional Law Corporation To Comply With Subpoena is continued to May 15, 2013 per the agreement of the parties and in order to give Plaintiff the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B and the minute order issued on March 26, 2013. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than April 10, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. The court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Paul Renne, Judge Pro-Tem, Cynthia Herbert, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/jpt

Notice Of Hearing On A Petition For Relief To Compel Kazan, Mcclain, Lyons, Greenwood & Harley, A Professional Law Corporation To Comply With Subpoena; Request For Judicial Notice; Declarations Of James F. Ruggeri
Off Calendar Mar-06-2013 Continued To Apr-10-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS HARTFORD ACCIDENT AND INDEMNITY COMPANY, FIRST STATE INSURANCE COMPANY, NEW ENGLAND INSURANCE COMPANY'S Petition For Relief To Compel Kazan, Mcclain, Lyons, Greenwood & Harley, A Professional Law Corporation To Comply With Subpoena is Continued to April 10, 2013 per the ex parte order issued on March 4, 2013. The court no longer has courtesy copies. The parties are instructed to provide courtesy copies of all papers filed in support and in opposition to the motion to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than March 10, 2013 at 4 pm. Judge Pro Tem: Elizabeth Riles; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported
